_metadata.name: Web Attack Surface Quick Win Hunt
_metadata.description: Authorized bug bounty workflow that refreshes live web metadata, crawls endpoints, runs safe exposure checks, reviews TLS posture, and writes a prioritized quick-win lead report.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: Web Attack Surface Quick Win Hunt
manifest.description: Find common, authorized bug bounty leads from known live web assets using httpx, Katana, Nuclei, and testssl.
manifest.author: sentris-team

graph.name: Web Attack Surface Quick Win Hunt
graph.description: Quick web lead triage workflow for authorized bug bounty assets.

runtimeInputs.label: Live URLs
runtimeInputs.description: Known live URLs or hosts from authorized scope.

runtimeInputs.label: Out-of-scope paths
runtimeInputs.description: Paths that should not be tested.

runtimeInputs.label: Scan intensity
runtimeInputs.description: Operator note such as safe, normal, or thorough.
